context: Tests whether the agent uses the compose_detailed method to obtain both audio and metadata, correctly accesses the response fields (json, filename, audio), and handles the metadata output properly.

checklist.name: Uses compose_detailed
checklist.description: Calls client.music.compose_detailed() rather than client.music.compose() to get metadata alongside audio

checklist.name: Accesses json field
checklist.description: Accesses result.json (or equivalent) from the compose_detailed response to retrieve the composition plan and metadata

checklist.name: Accesses filename field
checklist.description: Accesses result.filename from the compose_detailed response

checklist.name: Accesses audio field
checklist.description: Accesses result.audio from the compose_detailed response to get the audio bytes

checklist.name: Audio write from bytes
checklist.description: Writes result.audio as bytes to a file (not iterating over chunks as with compose(), since compose_detailed returns bytes directly)

checklist.name: Metadata saved to JSON
checklist.description: Saves the metadata/composition plan to a JSON file

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from elevenlabs.client (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: Env var authentication
checklist.description: Creates the client without hardcoding an API key, relying on the ELEVENLABS_API_KEY environment variable

checklist.name: Prompt parameter used
checklist.description: Passes a prompt string to compose_detailed(), not a composition_plan

checklist.name: Lyrics awareness
checklist.description: Code checks for or references lyrics in the metadata (since compose_detailed metadata includes lyrics if applicable)
